title: Relsy Starry Grey Kids Pop Up Tent Outdoor, 135cm x 100cm, Kids Play Tent, Adventure Indoor & Outdoor Toys Foldable, Play Den Ball Pit Garden Toys For Toddler Girls & Children Age 3-10
features: [Play Den] Our starry gray play tent for kids is a wonderful den for relaxing, playing games and spending time with friends.
[Independence] Promote children to seek and be content with independent play time in their own cozy kids tent safe space with a drop down door for added privacy
[Versatile] Makes for ideal indoor tent and outdoor tent for kids, whether it's a summer garden play or a bedroom reading nook.
[Simple] Easily build the pop up tent in a few minutes and includes a carry bag for easy transport and storage, ready to go when the moment needs.
[Clean] Made from 100% polyester fabric for easy cleaning and quick drying.
description: Product Description Starry Grey Play Tent A perfectly cosy reading nook and play den for toddlers and children to play independently or with friends. Ideal for: Sleeping Reading Games Parties Ideal Size Ideally sized for a comfortable play den that fits is most bedrooms or lounge areas. Measures 135cm / 53in tall with a 100cm / 39in diameter base.
